blocks.text: MacIntyre at -14 with a four-shot cushion over Åberg heading into Sunday's final round. Reitan sits T8 at -6 — a charge today is the perfect Masters tune-up.
Real Madrid travel to Mallorca at 16:15 before Barcelona kick off at the Metropolitano at 21:00. Four points separate the title rivals — this Saturday shapes the race.
⛳ Sat 06:00 — Monte-Carlo Masters; Ruud opens clay season on his favourite surface
🚴 Sun 10:00 — Tour of Flanders; seven Norwegians on the cobbles at cycling's greatest Monument

blocks.label: ⚽ Champions League — Quarterfinal First Legs
items: Tue 21:00 — Bayern Munich at Real Madrid (Bernabéu)
Wed 21:00 — Atlético Madrid at Barcelona (Camp Nou)
